mapper.update: UPDATE scheduler_node SET host = #{host}, port = #{port}, status = #{status}, last_heartbeat_time = #{lastHeartbeatTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE node_id = #{nodeId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, node_id, host, port, status, last_heartbeat_time, create_time, update_time FROM scheduler_node WHERE status = 'ONLINE' AND last_heartbeat_time >= #{heartbeatAfter} ORDER BY node_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE scheduler_node SET status = 'OFFLINE', update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 'ONLINE' AND last_heartbeat_time < #{heartbeatBefore}
